projects_page.title: All Projects
projects_page.subtitle: Unreal Engine 5 / C++ / Blueprint / PC / Android
description: A complete overview of my published games and technical experiments
from full action-adventure titles to mobile ports and deep-dives into advanced Unreal Engine systems.
experiments_desc: Experimental projects where I explore advanced Unreal Engine systems and test new mechanics.
Technical showcases built for learning, pushing boundaries, and deepening my understanding of complex

ruins.name: Ruins' Rhapsody
desc: Play as Alessandra Morioka, a daring archaeologist hunting for an ancient mysterious relic.
An action-adventure demo inspired by Tomb Raider and Uncharted,
blending a dynamic movement system, environmental puzzles, intense combat,
and immersive exploration across breathtaking ancient ruins.
Developed in Unreal Engine 5.

goblin.name: Goblin Jr. Adventure
desc: Guide a courageous little Goblin through stylized cube worlds filled with traps,
hidden secrets, and glittering treasures.
A colorful collect-a-thon platformer designed for casual players and kids,
featuring coin collection, leaderboard challenges, and a short but thrilling experience.
Available in English and Italian.

zombie.name: Zombie Siege Chronicles
desc: A group project created for the Rookie Awards 2024.
Defend your base from relentless zombie waves using turrets, defensive barriers,
and special structures in this top-down tower defense game.
Features unique zombie types (Tank, Katana…), special events like Zombie Frenzy,
and strategic resource management.

flying.name: Flying Bird
desc: A 3D remake of the iconic mobile game Flappy Bird,
built in Unreal Engine 5.4 and available on both Windows and Android.
Navigate the bird through obstacles with simple one-touch controls.
Endless gameplay — aim for the highest score possible.

wizard.name: WizardScape: The Magic Chase
desc: A mobile survival action game for Android built in Unreal Engine.
Control a young wizard with an auto-cast spell combat system:
customize upgrades, manage diamond-based power-ups,
and survive increasingly difficult enemy waves.
Pre-Alpha demo — showcasing core mechanics in both C++ and Blueprints.

more.name: More to come
desc: More projects are on the way! Stay tuned for updates and exciting new content.
In the meantime, feel free to explore my GitHub and GitLab repositories for more in-depth insights.

state_trees.name: State Tree AI
desc: Practical exploration of Unreal Engine's State Tree system
for AI behavior and quest management.
Showcasing modern approaches to game logic, AI decision-making,
and dynamic event-driven systems.
Work in progress.

gas.name: GAS Abilities
desc: A technical deep-dive into Unreal Engine's Gameplay Ability System (GAS).
Focused on implementing advanced ability mechanics, attribute systems,
and gameplay effects —
one of Unreal's most powerful and complex frameworks.

projects_page.archive_desc: Projects that never shipped — cancelled or shelved along the way. Part of the process.

game_cancelled.name: Echoes of the Witch Wood
desc: An internal action platformer prototype with two playable characters,
a shared ability interface system, environmental mechanics, enemy AI,
and a full save pipeline.
Cancelled before public announcement.

game_shelved.name: Project Pyramid
desc: A team action-adventure game set in ancient Egypt.
I built the full enemy AI system — stealth perception, Behavior Tree,
EQS search, Dummy Entity subsystem, and ally coordination.
The team is still actively developing it; my work is currently on hold.
